title: cocculus orbiculatus var. mollis
intro: Cocculus orbiculatus var. mollis, also known as the Chinese Paradise tree or Chinese birthwort, is a plant species that belongs to the family Menispermaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cocculus orbiculatus var. mollis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Cocculus orbiculatus var. mollis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and it can also be used to make teas, tinctures, and other herbal preparations.
